Subject: Cyber quote — Nimbus Health

Hi,

Quote request below:

Insured: Nimbus Health Ltd (07654321)
Business: clinical data platform for GP surgeries
Years trading: 4
Prior claims: 1 (a minor breach in 2023, since settled)
Customer records: around 2 million patient records
Requested limit: £500,000

They haven't shared revenue figures yet — will follow up separately.

Regards, Priya
